sentences.text: Hello.
Hello here.

you know, kind of in, like the thick of this is my last call for the day, which is great.

Ok.

Yeah, it's funny.

But it kind of works out because living in Arizona, especially over summer, like, you have to get up at six in the morning to take your dog out because it's too hot during, you know.
Um, so, like, I have calls at 7 a.m. eight AM but then by, like, two, I'm pretty much kind of done.
That's nice.
Yeah, but I'm over the west region so it's, I've never really done, like, yeah, you know, I might have a 430 call.
But, yeah, not too bad.
Well, it sounds like a good day for you then.
I'm in Madison, Wisconsin.
So I'm central.
Ok.
Cool.
Yeah.

I went to Madison.

cool.

cool.

So pretty new.
Yeah.
Yeah, like two months in, but just kind of jumping in and running.

How's it going so far?
It's good.
Um, it's been, it's been, uh, it's been really nice actually because my time in between leaving Cushman Wakefield and here was at a prop tech company called Smart Rent.
Uh, which is, they're base 0.4 miles from where I live.
Uh, which is why I moved out here from Minneapolis a few years ago.
So, um, it's been nice to be back just in like the multifamily marketing space versus working for a prop tech company that just went public and the chaos of that.
And um, so it's been really nice.
And, uh also I've done third party, I've done owner operated, you know, right now, 29 streets, basically owner operated.
It's a separate separate capital group still, but it's kind of all under one umbrella.

So it's been really nice to not have like 10 different ownership groups to manage on top of your internal management company, you know, like that, you have like 30 bosses all the and here it's only a couple.
So it
is really nice and it's nice like on our end when I'm having these conversations, so I can just tell what a different conversation it is when you talk straight, third party to owner operated.
It's like just such a different conversation as far as how do we get this done on both sides?

from a marketing standpoint, we are not involved in like leasing training or anything like that.

so that's kind of the structure of it.
